job_description:
I want to completely redesign and replace my current Interview page UI.

Recreate the interface exactly like this design:

Layout Requirements:

1. Top Navigation Bar (Full Width)
   - Left: "AI Interview Session"
   - Center: Timer (e.g., Time: 08:25)
   - Right:
        - Warning counter (Warnings: 1 / 3)
        - Webcam status (Webcam: ON)
        - Notification + Camera icons
   - Soft blue background
   - Clean, minimal, rounded UI

2. Main Content Layout (2-column layout)

LEFT SIDE (Main Interview Area):

A. Interviewer Section
   - Circular friendly interviewer avatar (female AI avatar with headset)
   - Speech bubble message:
        "That's a great answer, thank you!
         Let's dive into the next question."
   - Soft shadow container
   - Rounded corners

B. Question Card
   - Large highlighted card
   - Light yellow background
   - Question text:
     "Can you tell me about a challenging project you worked on?"
   - Arrow icon on left
   - Slight elevation effect

C. Listening + Transcription Section
   - "Listening..." indicator with mic icon
   - Divider line
   - Live transcription box:
     “Well, in my last job, I led a team to redesign our company’s…”

D. Control Panel (Bottom)
   - Left: Mic icon + "Mute"
   - Center: Large blue "Stop Answering" button
   - Right: Volume slider with speaker icon
   - Rounded container
   - Soft shadow

RIGHT SIDE (Webcam Panel):

- Candidate webcam preview
- Rounded rectangle
- Bottom overlay label:
     "Face Detected ✓"
- Soft dark overlay behind text

BOTTOM FOOTER:
- "Need Help? Interview Rules"
- "Interviewer Mode: Friendly 😊"

Technical Requirements:

- Use React functional components
- Use Tailwind CSS
- Fully responsive
- Clean modern UI
- Rounded corners everywhere (rounded-xl or rounded-2xl)
- Soft shadows (shadow-md or shadow-lg)
- Use flex and grid properly
- Do not remove existing logic (timer, warnings, webcam state)
- Only redesign UI layout and structure
- Keep state and hooks intact

Create reusable components if needed:
- InterviewHeader
- InterviewerAvatar
- QuestionCard
- WebcamPanel
- ControlPanel
- FooterInfo

Make it production ready and clean.
Do not include placeholder comments.
Generate full JSX code.
